steps.t: Baradal is standing by at the Beorning Watchpost between Duskenvale and the Gladden Fields. You should talk to Baradal.
Baradal has asked to travel with you to the village of Arhaim. You should take the road south with Baradal.
Baradal has suddenly stopped along the road to Arhaim. You should talk to Baradal.
The village of Arhaim lies along the road in Duskenvale. You should travel to Duskenvale.
